page.title: Mangusta 80 vs Pershing 46: Marbella Yacht Showdown

data.meta_description: Compare Mangusta 80 vs Pershing 46 in Marbella. See specs, capacity, pricing & charter experience in Puerto Banús. Book your yacht today.
data.summary: A head-to-head comparison of the Mangusta 80 and Pershing 46 for yacht charters in Marbella, covering size, capacity, speed, pricing, and onboard experience from Puerto Banús.
key_facts: Mangusta 80: 24m open yacht, 12 pax, departs Puerto Banús
Pershing 46: 14m sport yacht, 10 pax, departs Puerto Banús
Mangusta 80 charter from €4,719 for 4 hours (includes jet ski)
Pershing 46 pricing on request via WhatsApp
Both yachts include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance & VAT
Mangusta 80 is ideal for larger groups wanting speed & space
Pershing 46 offers a sportier, more intimate experience

faq.q: Which yacht is faster, the Mangusta 80 or Pershing 46?
faq.a: Both are high-performance vessels. The Pershing 46 is a sport yacht known for its speed, while the Mangusta 80 is a larger open yacht with powerful engines. For exact speeds, contact us via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Can I charter the Pershing 46 for a full day?
faq.a: Yes, the Pershing 46 is available for charter from Puerto Banús. Pricing is on request, so get in touch via WhatsApp for a custom quote including skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT.

faq.q: Does the Mangusta 80 come with a jet ski?
faq.a: Yes, the Mangusta 80 charter includes a jet ski free of charge. This makes it a standout choice for thrill-seekers wanting to explore the Costa del Sol coastline.

faq.q: How many people can the Mangusta 80 accommodate?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 can take up to 12 passengers, making it ideal for large groups, celebrations, or corporate events. All charters include a licensed skipper.

faq.q: Is the Pershing 46 suitable for a romantic couple?
faq.a: Absolutely. With a capacity of 10 pax, the Pershing 46 offers a sporty yet intimate setting for couples or small groups who value performance and style.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price for both yachts?
faq.a: Both include a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). The Mangusta 80 also includes a jet ski.

faq.q: Which boat should I choose for a party in Marbella?
faq.a: For a party, the Mangusta 80 with its 24m length, 12-person capacity, and jet ski is ideal. The Pershing 46 is better for a smaller, faster, more dynamic experience.

faq.q: Where do these yachts depart from?
faq.a: Both the Mangusta 80 and Pershing 46 depart from Puerto Banús, the heart of Marbella's luxury marina, giving you direct access to the Costa del Sol's best spots.

data.body_html:
When choosing between a Mangusta 80 vs Pershing 46 in Marbella, you're comparing two exceptional yachts that offer very different experiences on the Costa del Sol. The Mangusta 80 is a 24-metre open yacht built for space and speed, while the Pershing 46 is a 14-metre sport cruiser designed for agility and style. Both depart from Puerto Banús and come with a full crew, drinks, and insurance — but which one suits your day on the water? Here's our honest breakdown.

Size and Capacity

The Mangusta 80 (24m) comfortably accommodates up to 12 passengers, making it ideal for larger groups, family outings, or celebrations. The Pershing 46 (14m) takes up to 10 pax, offering a more intimate setting. If you're planning a party or a corporate event, the Mangusta 80 wins on space. For a romantic couple or a small group of friends, the Pershing 46 feels perfectly proportioned.

Performance and Speed

The Pershing 46 is renowned for its sporty performance and sleek lines — a true thoroughbred. The Mangusta 80, while larger, is no slouch and offers a smooth, fast ride thanks to its powerful engines. Both yachts are perfect for cruising from Puerto Banús to hotspots like Marbella, Cala del Faro, or Estepona. For exact speed specs, contact us via WhatsApp.

Onboard Experience

Both yachts include: licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). The Mangusta 80 goes a step further by including a jet ski free of charge — a huge bonus for thrill-seekers. The Pershing 46 offers a more streamlined, performance-oriented experience, perfect for those who value design and handling.

Pricing Comparison

YachtLengthPaxPrice from
Mangusta 8024m12€4,719 (4h, includes jet ski)
Pershing 4614m10On request via WhatsApp

For the Mangusta 80, you pay a flat rate of €4,719 for a minimum of 4 hours, which includes the jet ski. The Pershing 46 is priced on request — contact us for a custom quote tailored to your itinerary.

Best Routes from Puerto Banús

Both yachts depart from Puerto Banús, giving you direct access to the best of the Costa del Sol. Popular routes include cruising past the Golden Mile, anchoring at Cala Cortés, or heading west to Sotogrande. The Mangusta 80's size makes it better for longer trips, while the Pershing 46 is nimble enough for quick dashes to Cabopino or Marbella Marina.

Which One Should You Choose?

Choose the Mangusta 80 if you're a large group wanting space, a jet ski, and a full-day party vibe. Choose the Pershing 46 if you prefer a sportier, more intimate ride with a focus on performance. Both are top-tier options for a yacht charter in Marbella — it really comes down to your group size and style.

Frequently asked questions

Which yacht is faster, the Mangusta 80 or Pershing 46?

Both are high-performance vessels. The Pershing 46 is a sport yacht known for its speed, while the Mangusta 80 is a larger open yacht with powerful engines. For exact speeds, contact us via WhatsApp.

Can I charter the Pershing 46 for a full day?

Yes, the Pershing 46 is available for charter from Puerto Banús. Pricing is on request, so get in touch via WhatsApp for a custom quote including skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT.

Does the Mangusta 80 come with a jet ski?

Yes, the Mangusta 80 charter includes a jet ski free of charge. This makes it a standout choice for thrill-seekers wanting to explore the Costa del Sol coastline.

How many people can the Mangusta 80 accommodate?

The Mangusta 80 can take up to 12 passengers, making it ideal for large groups, celebrations, or corporate events. All charters include a licensed skipper.

Is the Pershing 46 suitable for a romantic couple?

Absolutely. With a capacity of 10 pax, the Pershing 46 offers a sporty yet intimate setting for couples or small groups who value performance and style.

What is included in the charter price for both yachts?

Both include a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). The Mangusta 80 also includes a jet ski.

Which boat should I choose for a party in Marbella?

For a party, the Mangusta 80 with its 24m length, 12-person capacity, and jet ski is ideal. The Pershing 46 is better for a smaller, faster, more dynamic experience.

Where do these yachts depart from?

Both the Mangusta 80 and Pershing 46 depart from Puerto Banús, the heart of Marbella's luxury marina, giving you direct access to the Costa del Sol's best spots.

Still unsure? Browse our full fleet or WhatsApp us for personalised advice. Whether you pick the Mangusta 80 or Pershing 46, you're guaranteed a premium day on the water in Marbella.
